seasons.text: Happy New Year! HuaNuo will keep you company exploring Wanzai all year long~
Happy Valentine's Day! Bring your loved one to see the fireworks in Wanzai~
Happy Children's Day! Let's light up some fireworks in Wanzai~
Happy National Day! Come experience China's Nuo intangible cultural heritage in Wanzai!
Merry Christmas! Wanzai's winter is warm and cozy~

time.text: Good morning! The sunrise in Wanzai is beautiful — a fresh new day awaits!
Good morning! Where in Wanzai would you like to explore today?
Lunch time! Don't forget to eat — Wanzai's rice noodles are amazing!
Good afternoon! Feeling sleepy? Let's visit the Firework Plaza to wake up!
Evening already! The sunset at Wanzai Ancient Town is stunning~
Good evening! Did you have fun today?
It's late — time to rest. Good night~
Still up so late? You've got more of Wanzai to explore tomorrow!

default: Come watch the Nuo dance in Wanzai — let me show you this ancient tradition!
Want to launch some fireworks at the Firework Plaza?
Explore Wanzai Ancient Town with me — curious about its stories?
I'm HuaNuo, the guardian spirit of Nuo culture from Wanzai, Jiangxi.
Got questions? Fireworks, Nuo dance, ancient towns... I know them all!
Click the chat bubble to talk with me!
message.welcome: Welcome to Whizzzest Wanzai! I'm HuaNuo, your Nuo culture guide~
hoverBody: Ready to explore Wanzai with me?
tapBody: Want to chat? Click the bubble on the left!
